brief.goalFit: Help agents select the smallest trustworthy context before reading or editing files.
brief.platformFit: Sits between the SQL backlog and agent execution so future autonomous work starts from bounded, queryable intent.
nonGoals: Do not replace SQLite, JSON, JSONL, or SQL as canonical artifacts.
Do not bulk-load generated mirrors or long reports into agent context.
Do not implement a heavyweight agent runtime in the context broker.
risks: A packet can omit a critical file if anchors are stale.
A packet can become too large if generated artifacts are allowed into nextFiles.
Agents can treat advisory gaps as invisible unless they are queryable.
brief.expectedValue: Agents spend fewer tokens, inspect more relevant files, and keep context selection auditable.

rbacStories.story: As an agent, I can request a bounded context packet for an assigned feature before reading files.
As a maintainer, I can audit the last context packet for forbidden files and file-count violations.

userStories.goal: Generate a feature packet that names only relevant next files.
userStories.benefit: I can work from a bounded and explainable slice of the repo.

userStories.goal: Validate context discipline without reading generated mirrors.
userStories.benefit: I can trust that agent context stays cheap and auditable.

useCases.name: Feature packet for implementation planning
useCases.trigger: An agent is assigned a feature slice.
useCases.expectedOutcome: The packet includes feature status, items, elicitation status, contracts, gaps, next files, and required checks.

useCases.name: Context packet audit
useCases.trigger: A packet manifest has been written.
useCases.expectedOutcome: The audit reports file-count and forbidden-file status without bulk-reading generated artifacts.

functionalRequirements.statement: The broker must emit a bounded agent context packet from SQL-backed project intent.
The broker must make context discipline auditable without mutating backlog or audit state.
The packet must include elicitation status, experience contract rows, journey matrix rows, and advisory gaps when available.
The packet must exclude forbidden bulk files and cap nextFiles by workflow profile.
The packet manifest audit must report advisory warnings and hard failures separately.

successCriteria.statement: A feature packet for S07 includes elicitation metadata and experience contract rows.
Context audit passes when no forbidden bulk file appears and file count stays under the cap.

antiSuccessCriteria.statement: The broker must not include generated SQL dumps, audit JSONL, generated tracker JSON, or generated docs as next files.
The agent must not treat missing elicitation fields as invisible; gaps must be queryable and packet-visible.

experienceContracts.title: Agent requests a bounded feature packet
experienceContracts.intent: Start implementation from a small, relevant, auditable context packet.
experienceContracts.primaryAction: Run context:feature for an assigned feature and workflow.
experienceContracts.fallbackAction: Stop and report missing feature, missing profile, or packet audit failure.
experienceContracts.expectedCopy: Context packet sections should name feature, next files, elicitation status, gaps, checks, and forbidden bulk files.
experienceContracts.auditBehavior: The broker is read-only; material follow-up work records audit evidence separately.

journeyMatrix.expectedExperience: Receives a bounded packet with next files, checks, elicitation status, and no forbidden files.
Receives a clear error and no misleading packet.
Context audit fails with the forbidden file named.
The error names available workflows so the agent can retry with a valid profile.

scenarios.given: S07 exists and the workflow profile exists.
scenarios.when: The agent requests a feature packet.
scenarios.then: The packet includes bounded next files, elicitation status, and required checks.

scenarios.when: The agent requests a feature packet.
scenarios.then: The command fails with a clear unknown-feature error.

scenarios.given: A generated mirror is accidentally named in nextFiles.
scenarios.then: The audit fails and names the forbidden file.

scenarios.given: The requested workflow profile is unknown.
scenarios.then: The error names available profiles so the agent can retry.
